backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Nellore Print Hub backend, defining all data types (quotations, projects, reviews, chat, admin users, delivery, etc.) and including storage, authorization, and migration mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Motoko migration module that re-declares all actor state types and provides a `run` function to handle data migration between canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping implemented feature IDs to their associated source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for traceability and build planning.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for what each hook, page, and component does.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Nellore Print Hub' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all public, customer, and admin routes, wrapping admin pages in named AdminGuard components and providing QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and LanguageProvider context.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks for a valid admin session and redirects unauthenticated users to either the admin login or register page while showing a loading spinner.
frontend/src/components/BilingualText.ts: Renders English and Telugu text together, either stacked vertically or inline side-by-side with a separator.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Mobile-only fixed bottom navigation bar with icons and labels for the main app routes, highlighting the active tab.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: Modal bottom sheet component that slides up from the bottom of the screen with an optional title, close button, and scrollable content area.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: A select input that opens a BottomSheet with a list of options, triggering haptic feedback on selection and displaying the chosen value on the trigger button.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: Floating chat widget that allows authenticated users to send and view messages, displaying a login prompt for unauthenticated users and auto-scrolling to the latest message.
frontend/src/components/CustomerGuard.ts: Route guard that redirects unauthenticated customers to the login page and renders children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: Toggle button that switches the app language between English and Telugu with haptic feedback, visually highlighting the active language.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout providing a sticky header with navigation, a mobile menu, a footer, and a scroll-to-top button, wrapping page content with bottom navigation for mobile.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading state during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-style history of negotiation messages between a customer and admin, with distinct styling for each sender.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog component for collecting and saving a user's name, email, and mobile number with validation, haptic feedback, and i18n support.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetailMod: A modal dialog that displays detailed information about a selected project, including its image, title, category badge, description, and completion date with bilingual (English/Telugu) support.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A wrapper component that adds pull-to-refresh functionality to its children using touch events, showing a spinning loader indicator during the refresh action.
frontend/src/components/ShareAppButton.t: A button component that triggers the native Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy to share the app's URL and description.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A skeleton loading placeholder component that renders animated shimmer cards in four variants: project, review, quotation, and a default service layout.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: A wrapper component that enables horizontal swipe-based navigation by translating its children along the X-axis in response to touch gestures.
frontend/src/contexts/CustomerAuthContex: A React context that manages customer authentication session state, persisting the session to localStorage and exposing login/logout methods.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: A React context that manages the active language (English or Telugu), persists the selection to localStorage, and provides a translation lookup function.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: A hook that queries the backend to determine whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges, gating the query until the actor and identity are ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: A mutation hook that authenticates an admin by SHA-256 hashing the password and calling the backend's verifyAuthentication method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminContent.ts: Provides hooks for fetching and updating admin-managed site content (contact info, services, hours, gallery, etc.) via the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExists.ts: A hook that checks whether any admin users exist in the backend by querying the admin user count, used to gate initial setup flows.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Provides React Query hooks for fetching admin invitations and inviting new admin users, with SHA-256 password hashing before sending to the backend actor.
Provides React Query mutation hooks for registering the first admin and inviting additional admins, both hashing passwords with SHA-256 before calling the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAppName.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and update the application name via the backend actor, with a 5-minute stale time and cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides mutation hooks for biometric (WebAuthn) login and registration, checking device support and delegating credential handling to WebAuthn utilities and the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Provides React Query hooks for sending chat messages, fetching all messages, owner replies, and retrieving chat history per customer via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides hooks to get and set the company logo blob through the backend actor, invalidating the logo cache on successful update.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and update contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) via the backend actor with a 5-minute stale time.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerQuotations: Provides a query hook to fetch all quotation requests for a specific customer ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides hooks to fetch delivery configuration, calculate delivery fees by distance, and update delivery config (per-km rate and minimum fee) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Provides a mutation hook to submit a negotiation response for a quotation, invalidating quotation caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides hooks to get and set the office location via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on projects (get all, get by category, add, edit, delete) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements a pull-to-refresh gesture hook using touch events, tracking pull distance and triggering an async refresh callback when a threshold is exceeded.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationFile.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch the reply file blob associated with a given quotation ID from the backend actor.
Provides a mutation hook to handle admin responses to quotations (status update and optional message), invalidating quotation caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on quotations, including fetching all/my quotations, getting details, creating, adding details, approving, and managing customer-pending status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: React Query hook that fetches quotation statistics (counts by status) from the backend actor, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: React Query hooks for fetching all reviews, filtering by rating, and adding new reviews via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceImages.ts: React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting service images through the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Custom hook that enables touch-based swipe navigation between a predefined set of pages using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and saving the current caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoClips.ts: React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting video clips through the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines a deep teal and gold design token system for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wrapper class around the backend ExternalBlob type, providing methods to get bytes, get a direct URL, create from URL or bytes, and track upload progress.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page component displaying a hero section, a grid of company benefits, and a commitment section, all with i18n support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AboutContentMan: An admin-guarded page for editing and saving the About page's custom text content, loading existing content from the backend and updating it via the useUpdateAdminContent hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Renders the main admin dashboard with navigation cards for all management sections (quotations, projects, reviews, chat, users, etc.) and displays quotation statistics. Includes a logout button that clears the admin session.
Admin login page with email/password form that authenticates via useAdminAuth, sets a session on success, and redirects to dashboard or registration based on admin existence.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRegistrati: Initial admin registration page that requires Internet Identity authentication before creating an admin account with email/password; redirects to login if an admin already exists.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin user management page that lists existing admin accounts and provides a dialog form to invite new admin users with email and password credentials.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AppNameManageme: Admin page for viewing and updating the application name, with validation (non-empty, max 100 chars) and success/error feedback, wrapped in AdminGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BusinessHoursMa: Admin page for managing business hours per day of the week, allowing admins to set open/close times or mark days as closed, with save functionality backed by the admin content API.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Admin page that displays all customer chat messages grouped by email and allows the owner to reply to individual messages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContactInfoMana: Admin page for editing and saving contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) using the admin content API.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DeliveryConfigM: Admin form page for configuring delivery pricing, specifically the per-km rate and minimum fee stored in paise and displayed in rupees.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HomepageContent: Admin page for editing and saving a promotional/announcement text that appears as a banner on the homepage.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Admin page for viewing the current company logo and uploading a new one with file validation and upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Admin page for managing portfolio projects, supporting add/edit/delete operations with image upload via blob storage, form dialogs, and category selection by ServiceType.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for viewing and managing all customer quotations, with expandable cards, status/service-type badges, and actions to mark customer-pending or accept payment.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServiceMediaMan: Admin page for managing service images and video clips, organized in tabs, allowing adding by URL with service type selection and deleting existing media entries.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUsPage.tsx: Renders a contact page with business info (phone, email, address) fetched from the backend and a message form that submits via the actor's sendMessage method.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerLogi: Customer login page that authenticates users via email/mobile and SHA-256-hashed password against the backend actor, then stores session and redirects to the portal.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerPort: Customer portal dashboard displaying the logged-in customer's quotations with status badges, progress bars, and step labels, plus a logout button.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerRegi: React page component for customer account registration that collects email, mobile, and password, hashes the password with SHA-256, calls the actor's registerCustomer method, and redirects to the login page on success.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Displays delivery pricing config (per-km rate, minimum fee) and provides an interactive calculator that estimates delivery fees based on user-entered distance.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page showcasing the print hub's services, sample prints, and feature highlights with navigation to the order/quotation flow.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Lists the current user's quotation requests with status badges and expandable detail sections, including price, description, terms, and an approve action.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Displays a filterable masonry gallery of completed projects fetched from the backend, with category filter buttons and a detail modal on click.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: Success confirmation page shown after a quotation is submitted, displaying the quotation ID and a numbered list of next steps with navigation buttons.
A form page that allows users to submit a new print service quotation request, collecting service type, deadline, project details, contact info, and design status, then navigating to a confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Displays a customer's quotation cards with status badges, allowing them to accept, reject, negotiate price, or approve payment, with negotiation history and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: A static services listing page that displays all print service categories (design, digital, outdoor, indoor, screen, offset) with images, descriptions, and item lists, linking to the quotation request flow.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: A form page for authenticated users to submit a customer review with name, star rating, review text, project type, and an optional image upload, saving via the addReview hook.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Displays all customer reviews in a filterable grid by star rating, with pull-to-refresh support, skeleton loading states, and a button to navigate to the review submission page; requires authentication.
frontend/src/translations/en.ts: English translation strings for the entire frontend application, covering navigation, services, quotation forms, statuses, customer portal, and more.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Re-exports English and Telugu translation objects and provides a getTranslations helper that returns the correct translation record based on the selected language.
frontend/src/translations/te.ts: Telugu translation strings mirroring the English translation keys, providing full localization for the frontend application in Telugu.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Utility module wrapping the browser Vibration API to provide haptic feedback patterns for tap, success, error, and selection events.
frontend/src/utils/sessionStorage.ts: Utility module for storing, retrieving, and clearing admin session data in sessionStorage, with support for multiple key formats for backwards compatibility.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist parameters in sessionStorage and remove sensitive params from the URL.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: Utility module providing WebAuthn biometric authentication helpers for checking platform authenticator support, registering credentials, authenticating users, and converting between ArrayBuffer and Base64 formats.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom CSS-variable-based colors (teal, gold, ink, paper, sidebar, chart), custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display, Montserrat), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for 'Nellore Print Hub' at schema version 3, recording existing features (admin registration, login, route guards, dashboard) and pending new feature requests (AR-1 through AR-3) along with architectural notes and known issues.
